title: EasyUpgradeNetherite
description: Add a crafting recipe to the netherite upgrade.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a758ca60d6067fb9cd6a9ff1229a47f64e3a7af.png)
 
Adds a crafting recipe for the **Netherite Upgrade** in Minecraft, providing an alternative way toobtain it. Instead of relying only on **exploring the Nether**, you can now craft the upgrade and progress to **_Netherite gear more directly_**.

![image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3c7e06e89bbb86eae7410c312dbe59fa0cf4120.png)
![image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc066a8cbd0c01406d6b9782c2b60abfbaa01d6_0.webp)
